"'''Path to the Sky'''" was an [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] ballad<ref name="Betrayal" /> that had been released by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="TERC" /> the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo family]] used the [[Music/Legends|song's]] first five notes as the doorbell chime for their apartment on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Path to the Sky" was mentioned in the first installment of ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'', the [[2006]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'', which was written by [[Aaron Allston]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}
